expectations.text: The announcement (the raise) lands within roughly the first 210 characters, before LinkedIn's '...see more' truncation
expectations.evidence: Lead line 'We just raised $2.4M...' (~76 chars) lands the raise before truncation.

expectations.text: Shows awareness of the truncation point explicitly or structurally (front-loaded news, short lines, white space)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly explains the ~140/210 'see more' cutoff and writes to it.

expectations.text: Delivers an actual ready-to-post LinkedIn post
Uses the provided facts ($2.4M, Foundry Capital) and invents no additional stats, customers, or metrics
expectations.evidence: Uses $2.4M and Foundry Capital; everything else is bracketed, nothing invented.
